productDisplayName: Peter England Men Striped White Formal Shirt
description: Style Note For the man who likes to combine style and comfort, this shirt from the peter england collection is a must buy. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with denims and boots, thrown on a biker jacket and conquer the world in style. Product Details White shirt with purple stripeds, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18”) is wearing a size 44
